name: DynaVap The UniDyn - Ball Vape
summary: A titanium one-piece ball-vape from DynaVap with adjustable airflow, for flavour-focused patients.
description: The DynaVap UniDyn is a torch-heated ball vaporiser built as a single titanium piece, joining tip and stem to cut down on parts and add durability. Its BallR cap and convection heating focus on clean flavour extraction, while seven airflow settings and an adjustable chamber let you switch between microdosing and a full session. The extended length cools the vapour for a smoother draw. As with every DynaVap it needs a butane torch (sold separately) and a little practice, but it suits flavour-led patients who want fine control over each session with minimal maintenance.
